title: Saarattu Vandiyila Lyrics Kaatru Veliyidai
stanzas: <div>Saarattu Vandiyila (Meaning Chariot) Song Lyrics Kaatru Veliyidai
It is "Saarattu Vandiyila" song from "Kaatru Veliyidai" after love proposal song "Azhagiye" and beautiful love song "Vaan Varuvan".

adi veththala poatta
udhatta enakku
paththiram panni kodu

aanukko paththu nimisham
ponnuko anju nimisham
podhuva sandi thanam
pannum aambalaiya ponnu
kindi kezhangeduppaa

selaikku saayam pogum mattum
unna naan velukka venumadi
paadu pattu vidium pozhudhu
veliyil solla poigal vaenumadi

Vekkaththaye
kozhachi kozhachi
kungumam poosikodi
aasai ulla vervaiya pol
vaasam yaedhadi

ye poongodi
vandhu thaen kudi
avan kaigalil udaiyattum
kanni kannaadi

ponnuthaan raththina katti
maappilla veththala potti
eduthu rathina kattiya
vethala pottiyil mooda chollungadi

mudhalil maala maathungadi
pirahu paala maathungadi
kattil vittu kaalaiyile
kasangi vandhaa selai
maathungadi..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song title 'Saarattu Vandiyila'?

The title translates to 'Chariot', symbolizing a journey of love and emotions.

In which movie does this song appear?

This song is featured in the movie Kaatru Veliyidai.

Who are the singers of 'Saarattu Vandiyila'?

The song is sung by AR Raihanah, Nikita Gandhi, and Tipu.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Saarattu Vandiyila' was composed by the renowned AR Rahman.

When was 'Saarattu Vandiyila' released?

The song was released on February 28, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Saarattu Vandiyila, the characters experience a joyful celebration of love, reflecting the carefree and vibrant moments shared between them. The song's upbeat rhythm and enchanting lyrics evoke a sense of happiness and romance, making it a perfect fit for weddings and celebrations. As part of the film Kaatru Veliyidai, it beautifully captures the essence of youthful love and the excitement of new beginnings. The collaboration of talented singers and AR Rahman's masterful composition adds depth to the emotions conveyed in this delightful track.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Saarattu Vandiyila from Kaatru Veliyidai is a vibrant celebration of love, showcasing the enchanting collaboration of AR Rahman's magical composition and the soulful voices of AR Raihanah, Nikita Gandhi, and Tipu. This song perfectly captures the essence of romance with its upbeat tempo and heartfelt lyrics. Dive into this melodic journey that promises to uplift your spirits and evoke beautiful emotions.

I need to sing for you, as the time passes, I need to express it outside.

He took the fragrance of love and wrapped it in his heart.
She moves like a playful monkey, dancing around.
Now, give me a kiss that will awaken my senses.
The golden girl is like a diamond, take the net and catch the diamond.
In the beginning, the garland changes, then the milk changes, when the morning comes, the veil changes.
